identity.core_philosophy: Precision, Speed, Authority. A fusion of Swiss Design clarity and Cyberpunk utility.
identity.visual_style: Dark Mode First, High Contrast, Data-Dense, Glassmorphic Overlays

headings.usage: Main headers, Section titles. Use tight tracking (-0.02em).

mono.usage: Tracking Numbers, API Keys, IDs, Data Tables.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Gap-6 for grids.
layout.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Sharp edges prefered for 'Industrial' look.

grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-12 gap-4. Sidebar col-span-2, Main col-span-10.
grids.landing: Tetris Grid: Asymmetrical bento box layout for features.

buttons.style: Sharp edges or minimal radius (2px). Uppercase text for primary actions. Tracking-wide.

cards.style: bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-background/50 border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 h-12

sidebar.style: Fixed left, border-r border-border bg-background/95 backdrop-blur. Links: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl and bg-black/40 for modals and sticky headers.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Active elements get 1px solid primary.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the main background to reduce digital flatness.

motion.hover_effects: Slight lift (-2px) for cards. Glow intensification for buttons.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text.
DO NOT use 'Inter' font for headings.
DO NOT center-align dashboard content. Use left-align for data.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
Dark mode is the default. Light mode is secondary.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a ShipEngine integration. Focus on the 'Create Label' flow. It must be a step-by-step wizard in the dashboard, mirroring the Telegram bot flow. Use the 'Control Room' grid for the main dashboard view. Use the provided image URLs for the landing page and empty states.
